...Before heading back like this, I should check out that rest area first.
So this is where it connected... Ah, I finally made it back...
...Where did Elly go? I have to go look for her...
Tch! This...th-this is sperm, isn't it...! Tch, Elly...please be okay.........!

Even just the magic ore deposits are supposed to be a huge treasure trove... I wonder
what that noble-sama is really looking for? I can't help but feel it's all going to
end in wasted effort...
...So many condoms... Dario, what did you do to Elly...?!
